project.description: Deploy Meilisearch for the Dictionary API. Creates a Meilisearch container on the dictionary network, generates an API key, configures the dictionary to use Meilisearch as its search backend, and restarts the dictionary-api.

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
CONFIG_DIR="/usr/local/docker-config/dictionary" MEILI_DIR="$CONFIG_DIR/meilisearch" MEILI_IMAGE="getmeili/meilisearch:${meili_image_version}"
echo "=== Deploy Meilisearch for Dictionary ==="
# Step 1: Create meilisearch config directory (acts as feature flag) mkdir -p "$MEILI_DIR"
# Step 2: Generate a master key if one does not already exist if [ -f "$MEILI_DIR/meilisearch.env" ]; then echo "Using existing meilisearch.env" else echo "Generating new Meilisearch master key" MEILI_MASTER_KEY=$(tr -dc A-Za-z0-9 </dev/urandom | head -c 32) { echo "MEILI_MASTER_KEY=$MEILI_MASTER_KEY" echo "MEILI_ENV=production" } > "$MEILI_DIR/meilisearch.env" fi
# Source the key for later use MEILI_MASTER_KEY=$(grep MEILI_MASTER_KEY "$MEILI_DIR/meilisearch.env" | cut -d'=' -f2)
# Step 3: Add Meilisearch settings to dictionary.env if [ ! -f "$CONFIG_DIR/dictionary.env" ]; then echo "ERROR: dictionary.env not found. Deploy the Dictionary API first." exit 1 fi
# Remove any existing Meilisearch lines to avoid duplicates grep -v '^SEARCH_BACKEND=' "$CONFIG_DIR/dictionary.env" | \ grep -v '^MEILISEARCH_URL=' | \ grep -v '^MEILISEARCH_API_KEY=' > "$CONFIG_DIR/dictionary.env.tmp"
{ cat "$CONFIG_DIR/dictionary.env.tmp" echo "SEARCH_BACKEND=meilisearch" echo "MEILISEARCH_URL=http://meilisearch:7700" echo "MEILISEARCH_API_KEY=$MEILI_MASTER_KEY" } > "$CONFIG_DIR/dictionary.env" rm "$CONFIG_DIR/dictionary.env.tmp"
echo "Updated dictionary.env with Meilisearch configuration"
# Step 4: Pull Meilisearch image docker pull "$MEILI_IMAGE"
# Step 5: Deploy Meilisearch container docker stop meilisearch 2>/dev/null && docker rm meilisearch 2>/dev/null || true
# Ensure dictionary network exists docker network inspect dictionary >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker network create --internal dictionary
docker run --name meilisearch --restart always \ --network=dictionary \ --env-file "$MEILI_DIR/meilisearch.env" \ -v meili-data:/meili_data \ -d "$MEILI_IMAGE"
echo "Meilisearch container started on dictionary network"
# Step 6: Restart dictionary-api to pick up new config if docker ps --filter "name=dictionary-api" --format '{{.Names}}' | grep -q "dictionary-api"; then echo "Restarting dictionary-api to pick up Meilisearch configuration" /scripts/start-picsure.sh else echo "dictionary-api is not running. Run start-picsure.sh or the Dictionary API Build and Deploy job to start it." fi
echo "=== Meilisearch deployment complete ==="
